LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Workshop.label: workshop
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Workshop.description: A shared workshop of jigs, benches and good light. Colonists here simply work faster.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Granary.label: granary
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Granary.description: Storage pits, drying racks and proper field tools. Farmhands sow and harvest with far less waste.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Clinic.label: clinic
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Clinic.description: Clean rooms, boiled instruments and a place to rest. Doctors tend and operate with steadier hands.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_School.label: academy
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_School.description: A library of salvaged texts and a quiet study hall. Researchers make faster progress.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Barracks.label: barracks
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Barracks.description: A firing range and sparring yard with a drill schedule. Colonists shoot and fight with more discipline.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Market.label: marketplace
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Market.description: Stalls, scales and a reputation for fair dealing. Trades struck here favor the colony.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Hall.label: assembly hall
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Hall.description: A warm common hall for meals, music and news. Life feels a little less like survival.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Watchtower.label: watchtower
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Watchtower.description: Watch rotations and signal fires spot trouble early. Raiders arrive in thinner numbers.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Inn.label: inn
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Inn.description: Good beds and better gossip. Envoys and gifts sent from this colony leave a stronger impression.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Garage.label: caravan depot
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_Garage.description: Tack rooms, spare wheels and packed rations. Caravans move noticeably faster.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_ShipWorkshop.label: ship workshop
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_ShipWorkshop.description: A machine shop bolted into the hull. Crew aboard the gravship work faster.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_ShipClinic.label: sickbay
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_ShipClinic.description: A compact medical bay with everything within arm's reach. Shipboard doctors work with steadier hands.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_EngineBay.label: engine bay
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_EngineBay.description: Tuned injectors and a maintenance pit for the grav engine. Launches burn less fuel.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_CargoHold.label: cargo hold
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_CargoHold.description: Netting, rails and clever stowage. The crew can haul far heavier loads.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_NavRoom.label: navigation room
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_NavRoom.description: Charts, beacons and a steady hand on the stick. Rough landings become far less likely.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_CrewQuarters.label: crew quarters
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_CrewQuarters.description: Proper bunks and a shared mess instead of bedrolls between crates. The crew rests better and grumbles less.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_ArmoryBay.label: armory bay
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_ArmoryBay.description: Hardpoints, gun lockers and drilled boarding responses. Attackers think twice and come in thinner numbers.
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_TradeAntenna.label: trade antenna
LanguageData.Rpt_Bld_TradeAntenna.description: A long-range dish tuned to merchant frequencies. Trades struck aboard favor the crew.
